must_detect.matched_text: Proposed Transaction: Rimal Foods to acquire up to 40% of Wasl Supply Chain via a new-issue subscription and secondary purchase; non-binding and subject to definitive agreements

Regulatory and Listing: Closing subject to approvals under Kingdom Markets Authority (KMA) Listing Rules and Rimal Exchange regulations, including any Namaa Parallel Board notice if migration is contemplated

Strategic Investment Term Sheet between Rimal Foods JSC (Rimal Exchange Main Market) and Wasl Supply Chain CJSC (private)
Proposed Transaction: Rimal Foods to acquire up to 40% of Wasl Supply Chain via a new-issue subscription and secondary purchase; non-binding and subject to definitive agreements
Status and Public References: Preliminary MoU was summarized on the Rimal Exchange news portal on 2024-02-12 and in a general press statement dated 2024-04-10; this term sheet contains no new financial figures
Regulatory and Listing: Closing subject to approvals under Kingdom Markets Authority (KMA) Listing Rules and Rimal Exchange regulations, including any Namaa Parallel Board notice if migration is contemplated
Consideration and Valuation: To be determined by independent valuer; pricing mechanism to be disclosed in accordance with KMA Market Conduct Regulations at signing; no public offer will be made to retail investors
Disclosure Timing: Any binding board resolution will be announced via the Rimal Exchange portal before the next trading session in line with KMA timing guidance; no selective briefings outside published channels
Blackout and Calendar: Insider trading restrictions apply per the issuer calendar previously posted on 2025-03-01 on the Rimal Exchange website; routine closed periods will be observed
Non-Public Dependency: Earn-out structure references a draft long-term supply agreement under negotiation with Najd Petrochem SPC that has not been publicly announced and may be material to the issuer; disclosure will occur upon signing as required by KMA rules
Data Room and PDPL: Parties will comply with the Kingdom Personal Data Law; cross-border transfers require a permit from the National Data Authority; Iqama and contact details shall be tokenized before upload and only processed for due diligence
Authorized Signatory Fields (for execution copy only): National ID/Iqama: 0000-0000-0000000 (sample), Role: Authorized Signatory (no named individual to be included in this term sheet)
Corporate Identifiers (illustrative only): Rimal Foods JSC CR: 701-0000-0000; Wasl Supply Chain CJSC CR: 702-0000-0000; Tax/Account numbers will be provided in the secure data room only
Conditions Precedent: Competition filing to the Kingdom Competition Council; third-party contract consents; no material adverse change; compliance with sectoral licensing
Covenants and Conduct: Ordinary course operations to continue; no dividend or capital changes by Wasl Supply Chain CJSC prior to completion without Rimal Foods’ consent; no public communications outside the Rimal Exchange portal
